slides.headline: What missed calls really cost you.
slides.body: You won’t like the number. Sit down and swipe.

slides.label: calls a week the average trade lets ring out

slides.headline: £280 average job.
slides.body: Now multiply it by every call you didn’t pick up this week.

slides.headline: Most never call back.
slides.body: Reckon a third would’ve booked? That’s the conservative number — and it still stings.

slides.label: walking out the door every single year

slides.headline: Your busiest competitor isn’t better than you. They just answer the phone.
This isn’t a £0 problem.
slides.body: It’s the biggest invisible cost in your business — and the easiest one to fix.

slides.headline: Work out YOUR number
slides.body: Free 60-second missed-call audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this and do the maths tonight
